description.p: Alexandria is a GTK4 research library for managing scientific papers. Point it at a directory of PDFs and it extracts metadata (title, authors, year, DOI, journal) from XMP, page text, CrossRef and OpenAlex, then presents a searchable, filterable card browser.

ul.li: Full-text search across title, authors, abstract, DOI and journal
Citation counts and per-year sparklines from OpenAlex
Built-in PDF viewer with highlight and comment annotations
Preprint detection (arXiv, bioRxiv, chemRxiv and more)
Author follow — see what authors you track have published recently
Duplicate detection by DOI and file hash
Sidecar JSON metadata lives next to each PDF, never inside it
